title: Adon olam
html: Dm Gm Adon Olam, asher malach C F A7 Beterem kol yetzir nivrá Dm Gm Le'et na'assá becheftzo kol Dm A7 Azáy melech, azáy melech Dm Shmo nikrá Dm Gm Veacharei, kichlot hakol C F A7 Levadô yimloch norá Dm Gm Vehu hayá, vehu hovê Dm A7 Vehu yihyê, vehu yihyê Dm Betifará (REFRÃO) Gm Adon Olam, asher malach Beterem kol yetzir nivrá Dm Le'et na'assá becheftzo kol Azáy melech, Shmo nikrá A Veacharei, kichlot hakol Levadô yimloch norá Dm Vehu hayá, vehu hovê D7 Vehu yihyê, Betifará Gm C Adon Olam, asher malach F Bb Beterem kol yetzir nivrá Gm C Le'et na'assá becheftzo kol Dm Azáy melech, Shmo nikrá Gm C Veacharei, kichlot hakol F Bb Levadô yimloch norá Gm Dm A Vehu hayá, vehu hovê Dm Betifará Gm Dm A Vehu hayá, vehu hovê Dm Betifará Dm Gm Vehu echad, veein sheni C F A7 Lehamshil lo, lehachbirá Dm Gm Bli reshit, bli tachlit Dm A7 Velo ha'oz, velo ha'oz Dm Vehamisrá Dm Gm Vehu Eli, vechay goali C F A7 Vetzur chevli, be'et tzará Dm Gm Vehu nissí, umanos lí Dm A7 Menat kossí, Menat kossí Dm Beyom ekrá (Refrão) Dm Gm Beyadô afkid ruchi C F A7 Be'et ishan vea'irá Dm Gm Ve'im ruchi, gueviatí Dm A7 Adonay li, Adonay li Dm D7 Velo irá (Refrão)
